title: CURRENCY EXCHANGE SERVICES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 12.  CURRENCY EXCHANGE SERVICES

§1001.  Title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Check-Cashing Law".

Acts 1999, No. 1208, §1, eff. July 9, 1999.
